name: Gigastorage Corporation
summary: Gigastorage Corporation operates in the optoelectronics industry in Taiwan. The company manufactures and sells photovoltaic (PV) multi-crystalline wafers; and researches, develops, and manufactures PV ribbons, as well as provides PV modules. It also develops low-temp die attach paste for use in the packaging process for the electronics; and energy industries, including LED, thin-film-base PV cells, T/P, passive component termination, etc. In addition, the company provides biotech materials, such as blood glucose strip conductive Ag paste and carbon paste. Further, it offers PV systems comprising system construction and electric power selling services that consist of evaluation, suggestion, design, application, bid tendering in Bureau of Energy, manufacturing, facility registration, etc. Additionally, the company provides ground type solar power stations, as well as roof type solar power stations for private houses, public-owned buildings and factory buildings, and cottages; and PCB/BGA milling cutter and drill coating products, such as coated milling cutters and drills. Gigastorage Corporation was founded in 1997 and is based in Hukou, Taiwan.
